Legal

Terms and Conditions

Effective date: March 26, 2026

These terms govern your use of tholent.com and any services provided by Tholent.

Use of this site

This site is provided for informational purposes. You may use it for lawful purposes only.

Intellectual property

The content on this site is owned by Tholent unless otherwise noted. Open source software we publish is governed by the licence terms stated in each repository.

Services

Consulting and project work engagements are governed by a separate written agreement. Software products are subject to their own licence terms provided at the point of purchase or download.

AI-assisted work

tholent uses AI tools as part of our work. Where relevant to a specific engagement, this will be addressed in our working agreement. Read more on our collective page.

Disclaimers

This site and its content are provided “as is” without warranty. Nothing on this site constitutes legal, financial, or professional advice.

Governing law

These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Michigan, United States.
